tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with a stunning blue glaze finish, ideal for bathroom and kitchen walls. Frost resistant and easy to clean.
tiles.creator: Studio Azul

tiles.title: Marble Stone Elite
tiles.description: High-end marble tile with natural veining patterns. Brings a luxurious and timeless look to any interior space.
tiles.creator: Marmo Italia

tiles.title: Mosaic Gold Series
tiles.description: Handcrafted mosaic tile with gold-toned glass pieces. Perfect for feature walls, backsplashes, and decorative accents.
tiles.creator: Artisan Mosaics

tiles.title: Rustic Terracotta
tiles.description: Earthy terracotta tile with a warm, rustic finish. Great for Mediterranean and bohemian style interiors.
tiles.creator: Terra Studio

tiles.title: Natural Slate Grey
tiles.description: Authentic natural slate tile in cool grey tones. Ideal for outdoor patios, walkways, and industrial-style interiors.
tiles.creator: Stone Craft Co.

tiles.title: Rose Quartz Gloss
tiles.description: Elegant glossy tile in soft rose tones. A contemporary choice for powder rooms and feature accent walls.
tiles.creator: Blush Design Lab

tiles.title: Geometric Hex Black
tiles.description: Bold black hexagonal tiles with a matte finish. Makes a striking statement in modern and minimalist spaces.
tiles.creator: Form & Edge

tiles.title: Forest Green Glaze
tiles.description: Rich forest green glazed ceramic tile with a handmade feel. Brings nature-inspired warmth to kitchen splashbacks.
tiles.creator: Verde Ceramics

tiles.title: Travertine Beige
tiles.description: Classic travertine-look porcelain tile with subtle texture. Timeless and versatile for floors and walls in any room.
tiles.creator: Roma Stone Works

tiles.title: Midnight Navy Metro
tiles.description: Deep navy blue metro brick tiles with a satin finish. Perfect for creating a dramatic, stylish kitchen or bathroom.
tiles.creator: Metro Tile Co.

tiles.title: Calacatta White Marble
tiles.description: Premium Calacatta marble tile with bold grey veining on a bright white background. The epitome of luxury interiors.
tiles.creator: Marmo Italia

tiles.title: Terracotta Encaustic
tiles.description: Handmade encaustic cement tile with traditional Moroccan-inspired patterns. Each tile is unique and full of character.
tiles.creator: Souk Tile House

tiles.title: Sage Green Linen
tiles.description: Soft sage green porcelain tile with a linen-textured surface. Calming and elegant for bathrooms and living spaces.
tiles.creator: Linen & Stone

tiles.title: Onyx Black Polished
tiles.description: Dramatic polished black onyx tile that reflects light beautifully. Creates an ultra-luxurious atmosphere in any space.
tiles.creator: Dark Matter Studio

tiles.title: Chevron Oak Wood Look
tiles.description: Porcelain tile with a realistic oak wood grain in chevron format. Combines the warmth of wood with tile's durability.
tiles.creator: Woodgrain Ceramics

tiles.title: Aqua Blue Pool Tile
tiles.description: Vibrant aqua blue glass mosaic tile designed for pools and wet areas. UV and chlorine resistant with non-slip surface.
tiles.creator: AquaTile Labs

tiles.title: Sand Dune Textured
tiles.description: Sandy beige porcelain with a 3D wave-textured surface inspired by desert dunes. Adds a sculptural quality to walls.
tiles.creator: Desert Form Studio

tiles.title: Vintage Penny Round
tiles.description: Classic white penny round mosaic tiles with grey grout lines. A timeless retro style for bathroom floors and walls.
tiles.creator: Heritage Tile Co.

tiles.title: Copper Metallic Glaze
tiles.description: Eye-catching copper metallic glazed ceramic tile that adds a warm industrial edge to kitchens and feature walls.
tiles.creator: Forge Ceramics

tiles.title: Arctic White Large Format
tiles.description: Minimalist large format porcelain tile in arctic white with a subtle stone-look texture. Ideal for open-plan modern spaces.
tiles.creator: Pure Form Studio
